customSummary: Accomplished Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience designing, scaling, and migrating high-availability systems. Proven track record of leading engineering initiatives, optimizing API performance, and architecting robust cloud infrastructure across financial services and enterprise entertainment domains. Expert in TypeScript/Node.js backend orchestration layers, AWS cloud migrations, and modern TypeScript and Kotlin frameworks.
customIntro: Hey Greenlight hiring team, I'm so glad you're here! As a passionate Senior Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience, I have a strong understanding of what helps developers be as productive as possible. I have a general 'build it to be reused' mindset in every coding project that I take on, and I think this site and my Resume are a good show of that. I'm looking forward to our future converstaions and hopefully getting a chance to help build and support the engineering team across Greenlight.

Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS (Lambda, ECS, CloudWatch, Kinesis, S3, CloudFront)
